title: fixes for tests
body:
- set requred version of pillow to 9.5.0
- test-ffmpeg-reader - change duration number to match video
- ffmpeg-reader - add displaymatrix to be read as video rotation
- config set binary to autodetect

<!--
Please tick when you have done these. They don't need to all be completed before the PR is submitted.
Delete them if they are not appropriate for this pull request.
-->
- [x] I have provided code that clearly demonstrates the bug and that only works correctly when applying this fix
- [x] I have added suitable tests demonstrating a fixed bug or new/changed feature to the test suite in `tests/`
addresses issue #2183

step_plan.summary: This PR fixes test reliability by enforcing Pillow 9.5.0, aligning test expectations with displaymatrix-based rotation, updating FFmpeg metadata parsing to read rotation from displaymatrix, and enabling FFmpeg binary autodetection as the default.

steps.operation: Extend FFmpegInfosParser.video_metadata_type_casting to normalize and include rotation from displaymatrix
steps.reason: Displaymatrix rotation provides a more robust source of rotation data than the legacy rotate tags; normalizing this into video_rotation ensures consistent downstream handling.
steps.side_effects: May affect parsing behavior when displaymatrix data is missing or malformed; downstream consumers should gracefully fallback to existing rotation fields.

steps.operation: Update FFmpegInfosParser.parse to propagate displaymatrix-derived rotation into infos
steps.reason: Ensure rotation information sourced from displaymatrix is exposed in the parsed infos for all code paths that consume FFmpeg metadata.
steps.side_effects: Downstream code that relies on existing rotation fields may need adjustments if rotation data now originates from displaymatrix; add tests for both presence and absence of displaymatrix data.

steps.operation: Update FFmpegInfosParser.parse_video_stream_data to parse displaymatrix rotation when present
steps.reason: Capture rotation values tied to FFmpeg displaymatrix outputs so they propagate to video metadata used for rotation-aware decoding and sizing.
steps.side_effects: Edge cases where displaymatrix is absent or partially present should fall back to existing rotation handling; tests should cover both scenarios.

steps.operation: Modify ffmpeg_parse_infos to include displaymatrix rotation in the infos dict
steps.reason: Ensure the aggregated FFmpeg metadata includes rotation data derived from displaymatrix, enabling rotation-aware downstream logic.
steps.side_effects: Tests and code paths that read rotation metadata may need updates; ensure backward compatibility when displaymatrix is not provided.

steps.operation: Update FFMPEG_VideoReader.__init__ to initialize rotation from displaymatrix and adjust frame size accordingly
steps.reason: Apply rotation information during initialization so width/height and decoded frames reflect the actual rotated orientation when displaymatrix indicates rotation.
steps.side_effects: Potential changes to frame dimension calculations and performance; tests asserting rotated dimensions should be updated to reflect new behavior.

steps.operation: Set default FFmpeg binary autodetect and enforce Pillow 9.5.0 minimum in config
steps.reason: Autodetection improves cross-environment compatibility in tests; enforcing Pillow 9.5.0 ensures consistent image handling during tests.
steps.side_effects: CI environments may need Pillow 9.5.0 installed; tests referencing binary resolution paths may require updates; packaging docs should reflect the minimum Pillow version.
